name: Khardung La Pass
description: Famous globally as the world's highest motorable pass (elevation 5,359 m). A critical, heavily-guarded gateway connecting Leh to the Nubra and Shyok valleys.
history: Built in 1976 and opened to the public in 1988, holding immense strategic importance for the Indian Army.
famousFor: Extreme altitude biking, snow-capped vistas, bragging rights.
